TextureSampleParameter2D.desc: Samples a 2D texture exposed as a Material Parameter.

TextureCoordinate.desc: Outputs the UV coordinates of the surface.

ScalarParameter.desc: A scalar value exposed as a Material Parameter.

BlendAngleCorrectedNormals.desc: Blends two tangent-space normals while preserving angle.

Constant.desc: Outputs a single constant float value.

Constant4Vector.desc: Outputs a four-channel RGBA constant vector.

DistanceCullFade.desc: Outputs a scalar fade value for primitives affected by cull distance.

ParticleColor.desc: Outputs the current particle color data.

ParticleDirection.desc: Outputs the current particle direction vector.

ParticleMotionBlurFade.desc: Outputs the particle motion blur fade amount.

ParticleRadius.desc: Outputs the radius of the current particle.

ParticleRelativeTime.desc: Outputs the relative lifetime of the current particle.

ParticleSize.desc: Outputs the particle size as a two-channel vector.

ParticleSpeed.desc: Outputs the speed of the current particle.

PerInstanceFadeAmount.desc: Outputs the per-instance fade amount for instanced meshes.

PerInstanceRandom.desc: Outputs a random value stable per instanced mesh instance.

Time.desc: Outputs elapsed time for time-dependent material animation.

TwoSidedSign.desc: Outputs 1 for front-facing surfaces and -1 for back-facing surfaces.

PrecomputedAOMask.desc: Outputs the Lightmass precomputed ambient occlusion mask.

ActorPositionWS.desc: Outputs the actor position in world space.

CameraPositionWS.desc: Outputs the camera position in world space.

ObjectOrientation.desc: Outputs the object orientation in world space.

ObjectPositionWS.desc: Outputs the object bounds center in world space.

ParticlePositionWS.desc: Outputs particle position in world space.

PixelNormalWS.desc: Outputs the pixel normal in world space.

Rotator.desc: Rotates UV coordinates around a configurable center.

ScreenPosition.desc: Outputs screen-space position for the current pixel.

VertexNormalWS.desc: Outputs vertex normals in world space.

VertexTangentWS.desc: Outputs vertex tangents in world space.

ViewSize.desc: Outputs the viewport size in pixels.

WorldPosition.desc: Outputs the current pixel position in world space.

AtmosphericFogColor.desc: Outputs atmospheric fog color for the current pixel.

Desaturation.desc: Desaturates an input color by a configurable fraction.

DepthFade.desc: Fades opacity near intersections using scene depth.

PixelDepth.desc: Outputs the depth of the current pixel.

SceneDepth.desc: Samples scene depth at the provided UV coordinates.

Abs.desc: Returns the absolute value of the input.

AppendVector.desc: Appends channels from A and B into a wider vector.

Arccosine.desc: Returns the inverse cosine of the input.

ArccosineFast.desc: Returns a faster approximate inverse cosine of the input.

Arcsine.desc: Returns the inverse sine of the input.

ArcsineFast.desc: Returns a faster approximate inverse sine of the input.

Arctangent.desc: Returns the inverse tangent of the input.

ArctangentFast.desc: Returns a faster approximate inverse tangent of the input.

Arctangent2.desc: Returns the inverse tangent of X/Y using signs to determine the quadrant.

Arctangent2Fast.desc: Returns a faster approximate Arctangent2 result.

Ceil.desc: Rounds the input up to the next whole number.

Clamp.desc: Constrains input values to a minimum and maximum range.

ComponentMask.desc: Masks selected RGBA channels from the input.

Cosine.desc: Outputs a repeating cosine wave over the input range.

CrossProduct.desc: Returns the cross product of two three-channel vectors.

DotProduct.desc: Returns the dot product of two vectors.

Floor.desc: Rounds the input down to the previous whole number.

Fmod.desc: Returns the floating-point remainder of A divided by B.

Frac.desc: Returns the fractional part of the input.

If.desc: Compares A and B and selects the matching branch input.

Logarithm10.desc: Returns the base-10 logarithm of the input.

Logarithm2.desc: Returns the base-2 logarithm of the input.

Max.desc: Returns the higher of A and B component-wise.

Min.desc: Returns the lower of A and B component-wise.

Power.desc: Raises Base to the power of Exp.

Round.desc: Rounds the input to the nearest whole number.

Step.desc: Returns 0 or 1 depending on whether X is above the reference value Y.

SmoothStep.desc: Smoothly interpolates between 0 and 1 using Min, Max, and Value.

Sign.desc: Returns -1, 0, or 1 according to the sign of the input.

Sine.desc: Outputs a repeating sine wave over the input range.

SquareRoot.desc: Outputs the square root of the input.

Tangent.desc: Outputs the tangent of the input.

Truncate.desc: Discards the fractional part of the input.

StaticBool.desc: Provides a compile-time boolean value for material function logic.

StaticSwitch.desc: Selects between A and B according to a static boolean value.

TextureObject.desc: Outputs a texture object for use by material functions or texture samples.

MakeMaterialAttributes.desc: Bundles standard material attributes into a single MaterialAttributes output.

SetMaterialAttributes.desc: Sets selected material attributes on an incoming MaterialAttributes value.

BreakMaterialAttributes.desc: Breaks a MaterialAttributes input into standard attribute outputs.

GetMaterialAttributes.desc: Extracts selected outputs from a MaterialAttributes input.

BlendMaterialAttributes.desc: Blends two MaterialAttributes inputs according to Alpha.

CollectionParameter.desc: References a scalar or vector value from a Material Parameter Collection.

DynamicParameter.desc: Outputs up to four per-particle dynamic parameter values.

FontSampleParameter.desc: Samples a font texture exposed as a parameter.

StaticSwitchParameter.desc: Static parameter that selects A or B at compile time.

StaticBoolParameter.desc: Static bool parameter for material functions and compile-time decisions.

VectorParameter.desc: Four-channel vector parameter editable in material instances.

TextureObjectParameter.desc: Texture object parameter for material functions or texture samples.

TextureSample.desc: Samples a texture using optional UV coordinates.

TextureSampleParameterSubUV.desc: Particle SubUV texture sample exposed as a parameter.

TextureSampleParameterCube.desc: Samples a cubemap texture exposed as a parameter.

ParticleMacroUV.desc: Outputs macro UV coordinates for particles.

SphericalParticleOpacity.desc: Computes particle opacity for spherical particle rendering.

LandscapeLayerBlend.desc: Blends multiple landscape layer inputs into one result.

LandscapeLayerCoords.desc: Generates UV coordinates for landscape material mapping.

LandscapeLayerSwitch.desc: Selects between layer-used and layer-not-used inputs for landscape optimization.

LandscapeLayerWeight.desc: Blends Base and Layer according to a named landscape layer weight.

LandscapeVisibilityMask.desc: Outputs the landscape visibility mask value.

NamedRerouteUsage.desc: Uses a Named Reroute Declaration value elsewhere in the material graph.

AntialiasedTextureMask.desc: Samples a texture channel as an anti-aliased threshold mask.

BumpOffset.desc: Offsets UV coordinates using a height input for parallax mapping.

ConstantBiasScale.desc: Adds a bias to the input and multiplies by a scale.

DDX.desc: Outputs the screen-space DDX derivative of the input.

DDY.desc: Outputs the screen-space DDY derivative of the input.

Distance.desc: Computes Euclidean distance between A and B.

DistanceFieldGradient.desc: Outputs the mesh distance field gradient direction at Position.

DistanceToNearestSurface.desc: Outputs distance from Position to the nearest mesh distance field surface.

FeatureLevelSwitch.desc: Selects an input based on the active rendering feature level.

Fresnel.desc: Computes a view-angle based Fresnel falloff.

GIReplace.desc: Chooses different inputs for default, static indirect, or dynamic indirect GI paths.

LightmassReplace.desc: Uses one input for realtime rendering and another for Lightmass export.

PreviousFrameSwitch.desc: Selects current or previous-frame values for motion-vector aware materials.

QualitySwitch.desc: Selects an input based on material quality level.

RotateAboutAxis.desc: Outputs the delta from rotating Position around an axis and pivot.

SphereMask.desc: Outputs a soft spherical mask from positions A and B.

DeriveNormalZ.desc: Derives a Z component for a tangent-space normal from XY.

Transform.desc: Transforms a vector between material coordinate spaces.

TransformPosition.desc: Transforms a position between material coordinate spaces.

CameraVectorWS.desc: Outputs the camera vector in world space.

LightVector.desc: Outputs the light vector for supported light function/deferred decal contexts.

ObjectBounds.desc: Outputs the object bounds as a three-channel vector.

ReflectionVectorWS.desc: Outputs the reflection vector in world space.

MapARPassthroughCameraUV.desc: Map AR Passthrough Camera UVs (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

MeshPaintTextureReplace.desc: Mesh Paint Texture Replace (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

PathTracingBufferTexture.desc: 辐亮度（路径追踪） (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

ReflectionCapturePassSwitch.desc: Reflection Capture Pass Switch (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

RuntimeVirtualTextureSample.desc: Runtime Virtual Texture Sample (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SceneDepthWithoutWater.desc: Scene Depth Without Water (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

TextureObjectFromCollection.desc: Texture Object From Collection (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

MotionVectorWorldOffsetOutput.desc: Motion Vector World Offset (Per-Pixel) (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

LandscapePhysicalMaterialOutput.desc: Landscape Physical Material Output (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

AbsorptionMediumMaterialOutput.desc: Absorption Medium (Path Tracer Only) (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

RuntimeVirtualTextureOutput.desc: Runtime Virtual Texture Output (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SingleLayerWaterMaterialOutput.desc: Single Layer Water Material (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubsurfaceMediumMaterialOutput.desc: Subsurface Medium (Path Tracer Only) (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

VolumetricCloudEmptySpaceSkippingOutput.desc: Volumetric Cloud Empty Space Skipping Output <Experimental> (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

AtmosphericLightColor.desc: Atmosphere Sun Light Illuminance On Ground (not per pixel) (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

AtmosphericLightVector.desc: Atmosphere Sun Light Vector (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

MeshPaintTextureCoordinateIndex.desc: Mesh Paint Texture Coordinate Index (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

MeshPaintTextureObject.desc: Mesh Paint Texture Object (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SkyLightEnvMapSample.desc: Sky Light Env Map Sample (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

VolumetricCloudEmptySpaceSkippingInput.desc: Volumetric Cloud Empty Space Skipping Input <Experimental> (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

RuntimeVirtualTextureSampleParameter.desc: Runtime Virtual Texture Sample Param  (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SparseVolumeTextureSample.desc: Sparse Volume Texture Sample (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubstrateSlabBSDF.desc: Substrate Slab BSDF - Simple (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubstrateSimpleClearCoatBSDF.desc: Substrate Simple Clear Coat (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubstrateSingleLayerWaterBSDF.desc: Substrate Single Layer Water BSDF (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubstrateConvertToDecal.desc: Substrate Convert To Decal (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubstrateConvertMaterialAttributes.desc: Substrate Convert Material Attributes (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SparseVolumeTextureSampleParameter.desc: Sparse Volume Texture Sample Param  (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).
